sections.content: To choose and recruit an apt person for the job usually is an uphill task for the leaders. A mis-hire can lead to higher turnover and cost to the organization, while also staking the reputation of the company. Hence interviewing process needs to be structured and be conducted without bias to garner the best talent. Interviewing skills is one day program to learn effective interviewing techniques. With practical scenarios and roleplays this interactive intervention helps you to prepare before, during and after the interview.

content: To choose and recruit an apt person for the job usually is an uphill task for the leaders. A mis-hire can lead to higher turnover and cost to the organization, while also staking the reputation of the company. Hence interviewing process needs to be structured and be conducted without bias to garner the best talent.

Interviewing skills is one day program to learn effective interviewing techniques. With practical scenarios and roleplays this interactive intervention helps you to prepare before, during and after the interview.
Recruit the right talent without any bias
Understand the personality types for better judgement
Evaluating the responses with STAR model
Learn to what to do before, during and after the interview
Learn to interview with two or more interviewers
